---
title: "Homework 6"
editor: source
date: 05-05-2026
draft: false
---

**Homework 6 is due 05/15/2026 at 11:59 PM. Submit your homework on Canvas as one PDF document.**

The questions were obtained from Modern Mathematical Statistics 3rd Edition

1. Problem 3 on Page 510
2. Problem 12 on Page 511
3. Problem 21 on Page 523
4. Problem 28 on Page 524
5. Problem 29 on Page 524
6. Problem 39 on Page 530
